endpoints.label: Upload Attachment

fields.label: Subdomain
fields.description: Subdomain of your ServiceNow account (host token in the API base URL)

fields.label: Table Name or ID
fields.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

fields.label: Table Record ID
fields.description: Sys_id of the record in the table specified in Table Name that you want to attach the file to

fields.label: Input Data Field Name
fields.description: Name of the binary property that contains the data to upload

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: file_name)

endpoints.description: Upload an attachment to a specific table record

fields.label: Subdomain
fields.description: Subdomain of your ServiceNow account (host token in the API base URL)

fields.label: Attachment ID
fields.description: Sys_id value of the attachment to delete

fields.label: Subdomain
fields.description: Subdomain of your ServiceNow account (host token in the API base URL)

fields.label: Attachment ID
fields.description: Sys_id value of the attachment to delete

fields.label: Output Field
fields.description: Field name where downloaded data will be placed

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: queryFilter)

fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.description: Field name where downloaded data will be placed

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: queryFilter)
